settings.title: Yeti Nepal & Our Community
settings.subtitle: Proudly Supporting the Nepal Youth Club
settings.description: As a legacy electrical retail business rooted in Kathmandu, we believe in giving back to our community. Our partnership with Nepal Youth Club reflects our commitment to empowering young minds and building a stronger Nepal.

settings.title: Youth Development Initiatives
settings.content:
Since partnering with the Nepal Youth Club, we've focused on providing opportunities for young people in electrical trades and business skills. Our initiatives include:

  • Technical Workshops: Monthly training sessions in electrical installation and maintenance
  • Mentorship Program: Connecting youth with industry professionals
  • Scholarship Fund: Supporting underprivileged students pursuing technical education
  • Community Events: Regular networking and skill-building activities

Together, we're creating pathways for youth to build sustainable careers and contribute to Nepal's development.

settings.title: Our Family Legacy
settings.content:
For generations, QuickBee has been a cornerstone of Kathmandu's electrical retail and wholesale business. What started as a small family shop has evolved into a trusted supplier serving both local households and businesses across Nepal.

Our Values:

  • Trust: Built on decades of honest dealings and quality products
  • Innovation: Embracing modern delivery and payment solutions like QuickPay
  • Community First: Supporting local youth and sustainable business practices
  • Reliability: Same-day delivery in Kathmandu with 99.2% on-time record

As we grow, our commitment to our community roots remains unchanged. Yeti Nepal isn't just a business—it's a family dedicated to serving Nepal.
